channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A24's Investment Strategy Reflects Its Wall Street Roots
item.description: A24, a prominent film studio, has leveraged its financial savvy to produce critically acclaimed films on modest budgets, showcasing its commitment to artistic integrity and financial prudence.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: iOS 18’s Vocal Actions let you swap Siri for Google Assistant or ChatGPT
item.description: While Siri is becoming more useful in iOS 18, Apple’s next big software update also includes an easier way to invoke other voice assistants instead. It’s called Vocal Actions, and it allows you to trigger custom actions with any wake phrase of your choosing.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Apple Intelligent AI Assistant Tipped for Launch with Google Gemini Integration and ChatGPT Capabilities
item.description: Rumors suggest Apple's upcoming Intelligent AI Assistant will integrate Google Gemini, allowing for advanced search functionality, while also featuring ChatGPT capabilities for improved conversational AI.
item.dc:creator: axel.metz@futurenet.com (Axel Metz) , TechRadar

item.title: The Enduring Power of Print Media: Debunking the Myth of Its Demise
item.description: As digital media continues to dominate, print publications face an uncertain future. But is it really dead? We explore the reasons behind its resilience and why it remains a vital part of our information landscape.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Meta Quest 2 is sold out everywhere – paving the way for the Meta Quest 3S
item.description: The Meta Quest 2 is selling out everywhere – and that's as likely a sign as any that Meta Quest 3S is preparing for launch.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector) , TechRadar

item.title: 10 ways AI can make IT more productive
item.description: When it comes to maximizing productivity, IT leaders can turn to an array of motivators, including regular breaks, free snacks and beverages, workspace upgrades, mini contests, and so on.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI-driven exoskeleton lightens your load, elevates performance
item.description: Researchers have created an AI-powered exoskeleton that seamlessly adapts to provide remarkable mobility assistance and energy savings. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lenovo adds new AI solutions, expands Neptune cooling range to enable heat reuse
item.description: With the growth of artificial intelligence in data centers of all types comes not only requirements for applications and services, but the need to cool the power-hungry systems that run those workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Biden administration provides $504 million to support 12 'tech hubs' nationwide
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration said Tuesday that it was providing $504 million in implementation grants for a dozen “tech hubs" in Ohio, Montana, Nevada and Florida, among other locations.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: AI Regulation Evolution's Impact on Cybersecurity Threats
item.description: As AI regulations evolve, cybersecurity experts must anticipate and counter new threats emerging from the intersection of artificial intelligence and cybercrime. A two-way street where AI impacts cybersecurity just as much as the latter influences AI.
item.dc:creator: Ram Movva and Aviral Verma, Info World

item.title: Hijos de Rivera aúna supercomputación e IA para investigar “los sabores del futuro”
item.description: Hijos de Rivera está desarrollando un ambicioso proyecto de investigación en el que, según relatan, por primera vez a nivel mundial se ha utilizado la computación cuántica y la inteligencia artificial (IA) para realizar una simulación de la percepción del sabor.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Redbox owner’s bankruptcy filing is the final nail in the coffin for DVDs
item.description: Those red DVD kiosks peppering Walgreens across the country may have reached their end. Last week, media company Chicken Soup for the Soul Entertainment, which owns Redbox, filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: California Weighs AI Regulation Bill Amid Tech Firm Opposition
item.description: The California State Legislature is considering a bill to regulate artificial intelligence systems, despite opposition from tech firms.
item.dc:creator: Trân Nguyễn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: OpenSSH vulnerability regreSSHion puts millions of servers at risk
item.description: Researchers have uncovered a serious remote code execution vulnerability in the Open Secure Shell (OpenSSH) server that could let unauthenticated attackers obtain a root shell on servers and take them over.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Error in new lung transplant algorithm harmed sick and dying patients
item.description: A flawed new algorithm for distributing lungs to transplant patients wound up putting people with Type O blood at a disadvantage.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Royal Pratt, The Mercury News

item.title: 10 voice scams to watch out for – and your quick action plan
item.description: Any potential scammer can copy a voice with cheap, accurate AI software in their bid to swindle you out of big money. Here's how to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Evolving hybrid cloud strategies in modern agencies
item.description: How are the CDC and TSA managing cloud adoption to meet their missions? The post Evolving hybrid cloud strategies in modern agencies first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta's 'Pay or Consent' Ad Model Violates EU's Digital Markets Act, Preliminary Findings Reveal
item.description: The European Union has announced that Meta's advertising model for European users, which requires payment in exchange for consent, violates the bloc's Digital Markets Act, according to preliminary findings. The decision marks a significant regulatory milestone for the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: The technology powering Taylor Swift, Netflix and the Sphere
item.description: Disguise is a pioneer in an exploding market for visual graphics in demand from Hollywood to the NBA.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Supreme Court punts on Texas, Florida social media laws
item.description: The need for Supreme Court review grew more dire when federal appeals courts reached opposite conclusions.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court punts on Texas, Florida social media laws
item.description: The Supreme Court on Monday wiped lower court rulings regarding two state laws aimed at barring social media companies from banning users based on their political views, kicking the major First Amendment challenge down the road.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, The Hill

item.title: DoD’s Joint Staff GenAI sprint lays out 8 internal use cases
item.description: Lt. Gen. Todd Isaacson, the CIO for the Joint Chiefs of Staff/J-6, said a review team is completing recommendations for leadership around using GenAI. The post DoD’s Joint Staff GenAI sprint lays out 8 internal use cases first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Prevent Scam Calls: How to Block Anonymous Phone Numbers
item.description: Discover how to block hidden IDs on your phone and prevent scam calls with expert advice from Kurt 'CyberGuy' Knutsson
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boeing acquiring supplier Spirit AeroSystems for $4.7B
item.description: Boeing said Monday that it plans to purchase Spirit AeroSystems in a $4.7 billion all-stock deal decades after it spun off the supplier. The planemaker has for years outsourced parts of its production process to the Spirit.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, The Hill

item.title: 8 AI-powered apps that’ll actually save you time
item.description: You can’t open your eyes these days without seeing something about generative AI and all the reasons it’s, like, totally gonna revolutionize the way you work. And yet, call me surly, but most of the AI tools out there at this point seem far less impressive in practice than they do on paper.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Why (and perhaps how) Apple Intelligence will make money
item.description: We’ll leave it to future retrospectives to show us if it turns out be a good or a bad thing, but artificial intelligence will change everything, so of course Apple is building a business around it. That shouldn’t surprise anyone.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Windows 11 Insider Previews: What’s in the latest build?
item.description: The Windows 11 2023 Update has been released, but behind the scenes, Microsoft is constantly working to improve the newest version of Windows.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Instagram creators could soon make AI versions of themselves
item.description: Think you've seen them? Meta said “AI” will appear in front of the creator’s name followed by a “beta” tag after.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Too many passwords to remember? Here's what you can do
item.description: According to some unscientific studies, the average person has hundreds of passwords. That's a lot to keep track of.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Supreme Court nears the end of another momentous term. A decision on Trump's immunity looms
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — In the last 10 days of June, on a frenetic pace of its own making, the Supreme Court touched a wide swath of American society in a torrent of decisions on abortion, guns, the environment, health, the opioid crisis, securities fraud and homelessness.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: States Prepare Workforce for AI-Powered Job Market
item.description: As artificial intelligence (AI) continues to transform workplaces, states are taking proactive steps to ensure workers develop the necessary tech skills to remain competitive, rather than being replaced by machines that are increasingly intelligent and capable.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Amazon is reviewing whether Perplexity AI improperly scraped online content
item.description: Amazon is reviewing claims that the artificial intelligence startup Perplexity AI is scraping content — including from prominent news sites — without approval.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Navigating the future of healthcare: Transformation, measurement and integration
item.description: How will healthcare continue to transform? The post Navigating the future of healthcare: Transformation, measurement and integration first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: The Supreme Court rules for Biden administration in a social media dispute with conservative states
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Wednesday sided with the Biden administration in a dispute with Republican-led states over how far the federal government can go to combat controversial social media posts on topics including COVID-19 and election security.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Vatican City to Convert Controversial Radio Towers Site into Solar Farm
item.description: Pope Francis has decreed that an area in northern Rome, previously blamed for electro-smog due to Vatican Radio towers, will now be transformed into a solar farm to power Vatican City. This move aligns with the Vatican's commitment to reduce its environmental impact, as stated in the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Where tech, politics & giving meet: CEO Nicole Taylor considers Silicon Valley's busy intersection
item.description: Nicole Taylor has an insider's view of philanthropic trends from her seat as the president and CEO of the Silicon Valley Community Foundation.
item.dc:creator: THALIA BEATY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AI image-generator startup Stability AI looks for reshoot with new CEO and investor group
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The troubled artificial intelligence company behind image-generator Stable Diffusion is looking for a reshoot with a new CEO and a surge of investment from a group that includes Sean Parker, Facebook’s former president and Napster's co-founder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
